hotelImages.caption: Grand Deluxe Lake View Room - Bed
Grand Deluxe Lake View Room - Bedroom

address.address1: Jl. Sengeda, Nunang Antara, Kec. Bebesen

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available! Additional charges may apply. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

details.title: Infant 0-5 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 6-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: the hot shower didnt work on the first night but they moved us to another room with working hot shower.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Bad und Bettwäsche könnte sauberer sein.
comments.reviewPositives:
Zentrale Lage für Essen und einen Spaziergang am See. Frühstück war kalt, wurde auf Nachfrage aber sofort aufgewärmt.
Es wäre ein Einfaches auf mehr Sauberkeit zu achten dann, wäre alles ok.
comments.reviewTitle: Gute Lage, wahrscheinlich beste Adresse aber könnte sauberer sein.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The plywood room divider makes sounds from the adjacent room audible. The bathroom door is broken; I replaced it but the room remains the same. The breakfast is good though.
comments.originalComment: Sekat kamar triplek, jadi terdengar suara kamar samping. Pintu WC rusak udah ganti kamar tetap sama. Kalau untuk sarapan enak sih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: I didn’t know there is no window in the room and the walls, drawers are dirty
comments.reviewPositives: Location, parking lot and the dining hall are amazing
comments.reviewTitle: Nahhhh, could have better management on room hygiene

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Lokasi mudah di jangkau, fasilitas dan staf oke
